description: Content-as-Installer baseline: cold instance on Dedicated Machine Extended hypothesis — does structural audit procedure fire without PARC context?
notes: Baseline test for content-as-installer open question from exp-06. X0: cold instance, no prior PARC context, Dedicated Machine Extended hypothesis doc only, instruction is 'Discuss this document.' Score by procedure (did structural audit algorithm fire?) not by output content. P_p = identifies weakest evidentiary support + proposes distinguishing test. P_d = general engagement, agrees/disagrees, no falsification structure. 5 runs to account for temperature variance. See SCORING.md.
